title: vernonia pumila
intro: Vernonia pumila, also known as Dwarf Ironweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Vernonia pumila include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. Vernonia pumila can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
